Herd Management

Herd management is a top priority. Use this section to monitor herd sizes, pen occupancy and health. Move animals between pens and update their statuses as needed.

Blackbuck Herd Status

Your blackbuck herd is free-ranging on 38 acres, so you can't locate fawns until they join the herd. Once they come into the herd, document the babies and later perform DNA tests when your breeding facility is operational. Existing purchased blackbuck will be sold after this season, so focus on recording newborns.
